description:
India Book III, 44: Note from a certain Ḥajjāj to Yosef Yiju, in Mazara, Sicily. In Judaeo-Arabic. Informing him about a consignment sent to him by one of his sons. 
Dating: October–November 1154 CE.

Description from PGPID 5539:
Note from Hajjaj, in Messina, to Yosef Yiju, in Mazara, regarding a consignment sent to Yosef by his sons. Written around October-November 1154.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12 מ-Messina ל-Mazara. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
